recoder.service.ProgramModelInfo

Packages that use ProgramModelInfo
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder.abstraction
This package contains the meta model abstractions as used by the semantical services.
recoder.bytecode
This package contains classes that cover information derived from Java byte code.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Constructors in recoder.abstraction with parameters of type ProgramModelInfo
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ArrayType(Type basetype, ProgramModelInfo pmi)
    Creates a new array type for the given base type, organized by the given program model info.
     
    IntersectionType(List<Type> types, ProgramModelInfo pmi)
     
     
    NullType(ProgramModelInfo info)
    Create a new null type for the given program model info.
     
    Package(String name, ProgramModelInfo pmi)
    Creates a new package with the given name, organized by the given program model info.

  • Uses of ProgramModelInfo in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type ProgramModelInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Problem
    MethodKit.checkMethodRedefinition(ProgramModelInfo pmi, Method redefined, Method redefining)
    Query that finds out problems if one method redefines another one.
    static List<? extends ClassType>
    TypeKit.getCoveredSubtypes(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<? extends ClassType> list)
    Gets all types in the given list that are subtypes of other types in the list.
    static boolean
    TypeKit.isCovered(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<? extends ClassType> x, List<? extends ClassType> y)
    Checks if for each class type in the first type list there is a super type in the second.
    static List<ClassType>
    TypeKit.removeCoveredSubtypes(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<ClassType> list)
    Removes types in the given list that are subtypes of other types in the list and returns the removed types in a new list.

  • Uses of ProgramModelInfo in recoder.service

    Subinterfaces of ProgramModelInfo in recoder.service
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ByteCodeInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with bytecode representations.
    interface 
    CrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Source information service supporting cross reference information.
    interface 
    ImplicitElementInfo
    Handles requests for implicitly defined program model elements.
    interface 
    SourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class

    Implements queries for cross referencing.
    class 
    DefaultImplicitElementInfo
    Handles requests for implicitely defined program model elements.
    class 
    DefaultProgramModelInfo
     
    class 
    DefaultSourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
